message.content:
Explore the collabspace-server codebase at D:/project/pt-gitlab/collabspace/collabspace-server to find all code related to space/workspace permissions. Look for:
1. Space-related controllers, services (SpaceController, SpaceService, etc.)
2. Permission/role management (role assignment, permission check)
3. Any "空间站" (space station) related code
4. Member management in spaces
5. Keywords: space, permission, role, member, 空间, 权限, 角色, 成员

Focus on understanding the current permission model - how are permissions assigned, checked, and managed in spaces. Report file paths and key method signatures.
